properties.name: Rupert Park - East of fieldhouse
properties.latest_review_text:
Rupert Park! And the first true bubbler review ðð
10/10. Maybe minus .01 because for the first time in my life, I almst got hit by a golf ball while I was taking a drink while filming this. That has literally never happened before!
While this is 10/10 for drinking it may be a bit tricky for filling a waterbottle. Not impossible, though!
#yvrwaterfountains #rupertparkpitchandputt

properties.name: Kensington Park
properties.latest_review_text:
Kensington Park! I couldn't find the outdoor fountain, so here we are inside the community centre. 7/10, perfectly average.
 
 
 
I was supposed to meet a friend to swim at the kensington outdoor pool today. I put "kensington pool" into google maps, and it brought me here. I checked in, got changed, and walked on the deck with all my fancy swim gear, only to see not an outdoor pool with my friend in it, but an indoor wading-style pool (definitely no lengths). I asked the lifeguard if there was also an outdoor pool somewhere. He laughed at me and said... "I think in Burnaby!" 
I went back in the changeroom to text my friend that I didn't know there were two pools and that I was at the wrong one. There was no reception. I pivoted like a champ and put my fancy swim goggles and cap in my locker, went back out on deck, put on a floaty, and then aquajogged with a handful of seniors for 30min.
When life hands you lemons... please don't make lemonade in the pool.

#yvrwaterfountains #kensingtonpark

I went back in the changeroom to text my friend that I didn't know there were two pools and that I was at the wrong one. There was no reception. properties.name: Sunset Beach
properties.latest_review_text:
Sunset Beach! This one gets points for location, but is very average in all other ways. Good temperature, not amazing water pressure though. Probably ok for a waterbottle. I've spent a lot of time at this fountain when I've gone on summer daytime runs without hydrating. 7/10. It'd be a 6, but location and times it has saved my life bump it up to 7!
#yvrwaterfountains #sunsetbeach

properties.name: Hastings Park -Plateau Sport Parks / Empire Fields
properties.location: Hastings Park -Plateau Sport Parks / Empire Fields
properties.address: Hastings Park -Plateau Sport Parks / Empire Fields
properties.latest_review_text:
Last of empire fields (for now... there's still one more fountain there to review!)
.
This one is by the bathrooms. The drain is already plugged, and that grosses me out. Temperature is usually ok with this one, and stream is average. I think this one is ok for waterbottle filling, and actually I'd prefer to use it for that over putting my face near the standing water.
You can read some cool facts by this fountain, which makes it slightly better IMHO
4/10 for drinking, 6/10 for bottles
#yvrwaterfountains #vancouversports
